calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Xia Zhao, Esq. appeared for plaintiff World Journal Books (Typing King).
Yaping Qian, partner in World Journal Books, (Typing King) was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Victor Feng, a/k/a Victor Hai Ping Feng, or America East Enterprise Corp.
Amended default entered against defendants on March 25, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, April 15, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff World Journal Books (Typing King), and against the Defaulted Defendants Victor Feng, a/k/a Victor Hai Ping Feng and America East Enterprise Corp. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,811.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,625.71.
Costs - $1,927.00, for a total of $118,363.71.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
